visual_analysis: The layout is well-organized and clearly presents the various functionalities of the interactive application. The use of color is visually appealing and enhances readability, although some areas may feel a bit dense due to text-heavy sections.
educational_analysis: The application presents a clear educational concept focused on prefix trees, supported by instructional elements like tips and example controls. However, the educational value could be improved with more explicit learning objectives and visual aids to enhance understanding.
